case_title: HENRY WONG VS. MIGUEL ANGEL BOLANOS

docket_entries.description: PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (FEE: $40.00) SERVED OCT-08-2015, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT BOLANOS, MIGUEL ANGEL

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2015 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOVEMBER-20-2015 BY JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL. THE PLAINTIFF APPEARS WITH CANTONESE LANGUAGE INTERPRETER EDWARD CHU, CALIF. LICENSE #300949; THE DEFENDANT APPEARS AND IS ASSISTED BY SPANISH LANGUAGE INTERPRETER; NO EXHIBITS ARE RETAINED FOR EITHER PLAINTIFF OR DEFENDANT. NOT REPORTED. JUDGE DONALD S. MITCHELL; CLERK M.L. MANZELLA; NOT REPORTED (DEPT. 506).

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WONG, HENRY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOLANOS, MIGUEL ANGEL $1,403.66 PRINCIPAL, $70.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,473.66 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT, FULLY SATISFIED, SIGNATURE VERIFIED AS TO DEFENDANT BOLANOS, MIGUEL ANGEL
AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $1,403.66 FILED BY WONG, HENRY AS TO DEFENDANT BOLANOS, MIGUEL ANGEL ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-20-2015 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF NOV-20-2015 - JUDGMENT.
